---
name: Suggest a Skill
about: Propose a new skill for inclusion in this collection
title: '[SKILL] '
labels: new-skill
---

## Skill Name
<!-- What would you call this skill? (lowercase-hyphenated) -->

## Description (1 sentence)
<!-- What does this skill do? This text appears in the description field — be specific -->

## When to Use
<!-- When should Claude auto-activate this skill? -->

## Core Instructions
<!-- What are the key behaviors, rules, or patterns this skill encodes? -->

## Why It's Reusable
<!-- Why would others benefit from this, not just you? -->

## Sessions Tested
<!-- How many times have you used this in practice? -->
